name: Escort Boys
overview: The story follows the life of Leopold. For all, he is a waiter in a luxury hotel, but the reality is quite different. Faced with money problems, he secretly leads the life of an escort boy. A series in a dramatic world, disturbing and sometimes funny, we will learn if Leopold is ready for anything for money.

trailers.title: BANDE ANNONCE #1 ◆ Tome 1 [Les Garçons De Chambre]
